zh.Saint Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Bures: 英國素福爾可布勒斯 聖 瑪麗
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Fray於1441年出生在英國素福爾可布勒斯 聖 瑪麗時，她的父親Sir John Fray50歲，母親Agnes Danvers36歲。她於1471年與Sir William Saye在英國英格蘭賀特福爾布洛布恩結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1499年在英國英格蘭素福爾可布勒斯 聖 瑪麗享年58歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可布勒斯 聖 瑪麗。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Fray于1441年出生在英国素福爾可布勒斯 聖 瑪麗时，她的父亲Sir John Fray50岁，母亲Agnes Danvers36岁。她于1471年与Sir William Saye在英国英格兰賀特福爾布洛布恩结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1499年在英国英格兰素福爾可布勒斯 聖 瑪麗享年58岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可布勒斯 聖 瑪麗。

nameMeanings.name: Fray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: rare variant of   Frey   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.
English: from the personal name Fray, probably an Anglo-Norman French form of ancient Germanic Fredo (a pet form of names beginning with Fred- or Freth-), which was used by the Normans in Normandy.
English: nickname for a violent person, from Middle English fray, a shortened form of Middle English (Old French) affrai ‘attack, brawl, uproar’.

variants.name: Frey
meanings: Swiss German and German: status name for a free man, as opposed to a bondsman or serf, in the feudal system, from Middle High German vrī ‘free, independent’. This surname is also found in Hungary, Poland, and especially in France (Alsace and Lorraine). Compare Free and Frei .
History: This surname (see 1 above) is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Fray was born in 1441, in Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England, her father, Sir John Fray, was 50 and her mother, Agnes Danvers, was 36. She married Sir William Saye in 1471, in Broxbourne, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1499, in Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58, and was buried in Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England.

fr.Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England: Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Fray est née en 1441, à Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Fray, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Agnes Danvers, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Saye en 1471, à Broxbourne, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1499, à Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England: Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Fray 1441 in Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Fray 50 und ihre Mutter Agnes Danvers 36. Sie hat 1471 in Broxbourne, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom Sir William Saye geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1499 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Fray è nata il nel 1441 nel Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Sir John Fray, aveva 50 anni e sua madre, Agnes Danvers, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Saye nel 1471, nel Broxbourne, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1499, nel Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Frayが1441年にイギリススフォルクブレス サイント マリーで生まれた時，父Sir John Frayは50歳，母Agnes Danversは36歳であった。1471年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアブロクスボウルンでSir William Sayeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1499年にイギリスイギリススフォルクブレス サイント マリーで58歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクブレス サイント マリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버스 세인트 메리
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Fray(이)가 1441년 영국 수폴크 버스 세인트 메리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Fray(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Danvers(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1471년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 브록스보우른에서 Sir William Saye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1499년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버스 세인트 메리에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 버스 세인트 메리에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir William Saye em 1471, em Broxbourne, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. ru.Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England: буресь сеинт мэри, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Fray родилась в 1441 г. в местности буресь сеинт мэри, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Fray было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Danvers, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Saye в 1471 г. в местности броксбурн, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1499 г. в местности буресь сеинт мэри, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности буресь сеинт мэри, суффолк, Англия.
